compliance.label: Tailored for Every Business
compliance.title: Compliance Guide
compliance.subtitle: Select your business type to view mandatory filings, key deadlines, and Kota Associates' advisory notes — updated for FY 2025–26.
compliance.calendarSub: Critical dates for GST, TDS, Income Tax, ROC, and FEMA. Filtered by your selected business type.
compliance.ewbNote: E-Way Bill is a rolling, transaction-level obligation — not a monthly filing. Every movement of goods exceeding ₹50,000 in value requires a fresh E-Way Bill. Minimum penalty for non-compliance is ₹10,000 per consignment.

eway.label: Bulk E-Way Bill Generation
eway.title: E-Way Bill Centre
eway.subtitle: Complete e-way bill services for Legacy firms, MSMEs, MNCs, and logistics operators — with eligibility checker, penalty estimator, and step-by-step generation guide.
eway.guideTitle: How to Generate an E-Way Bill
eway.packagesSub: All packages include Part A + Part B filing, vehicle number updates, cancellation support, and bulk Excel upload.
